blended.narrative: Whitefish Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,613 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.3" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.6" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 37".
